hooks.command: FRONT=$(osascript -e 'tell application "System Events" to name of first application process whose frontmost is true' 2>/dev/null); echo "$FRONT" | grep -qiE 'ghostty|terminal|iterm|wezterm|alacritty|kitty|hyper' || osascript -e 'display notification "Prompt complete" with title "Claude Code" sound name "Glass"' 2>/dev/null; true

FRONT=$(osascript -e 'tell application "System Events" to name of first application process whose frontmost is true' 2>/dev/null); echo "$FRONT" | grep -qiE 'ghostty|terminal|iterm|wezterm|alacritty|kitty|hyper' || osascript -e 'display notification "Claude needs your input" with title "Claude Code" sound name "Glass"' 2>/dev/null; true
